comment: Frozen story-eval cases. Each is an immutable base..head range from this repo's own history, so every eval run generates stories for exactly the same diffs. Keep excludePaths aligned with what the app would exclude (generated dist/, lockfiles, screenshots).

cases.note: Bugfix flavor: review UI reliability and accessibility across 4 files. SLOW: subtle a11y/CSS reasoning over minified 2000-char lines in page-assets.ts makes this thinking-bound — observed >45min even though the diff is only ~100 lines. Needs a long timeout.
cases.head: 4d6f30c

cases.note: Small feature: walkthrough stage as bounded island + Check kicker (3 files, ~15 lines).
cases.head: abf82f4

cases.note: Deletion-heavy refactor: one-shot Notes model removes rounds, verdicts, and timelines (15 files, -2272 lines). Exercises deletion anchors and coverage of removed behavior. SLOW: 89 hunks means a long story; observed 35min at 2 lanes and >55min once the coverage rule lengthened stories. Give it room.
cases.head: 45d4f55

cases.note: Medium feature: rail numerals + storyless All-files escape (3 files, balanced add/remove).
cases.head: d7c3deb
